tasks.title: Dashboard API types + client functions
Dashboard Zustand store + TanStack hooks
KPI Grid + KPI Card components
tasks.description:
Build the KPI card component and the grid that displays key metrics at the top of the dashboard.

## File 1: `packages/ui/src/components/dashboard/kpi-card.tsx`

'use client' component for a single KPI metric card.

```tsx
import type { ReactNode } from 'react';
import { TrendingUp, TrendingDown, Minus } from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '../../lib/utils';

interface KpiCardProps {
  label: string;
  value: number | string;
  icon?: ReactNode;               // Lucide icon element
  trend?: 'up' | 'down' | 'flat';
  trendValue?: string;            // e.g. '+12%'
  color?: 'default' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger';
  isLoading?: boolean;
}
```

Styling:
- Card: `rounded-lg bg-[var(--surface)] border border-[var(--border)] p-4`
- Icon: top-left, muted color, 20x20
- Value: `text-2xl font-bold text-[var(--text)]` — prominent
- Label: `text-sm text-[var(--text-secondary)]` — below value
- Trend: bottom-right corner, small text with arrow icon
  - up+success: green text + TrendingUp icon
  - down+danger: red text + TrendingDown icon
  - flat: gray text + Minus icon
- Loading state: show animated pulse placeholder matching card layout
- Color mapping for value text:
  - `default`: `text-[var(--text)]`
  - `success`: `text-emerald-400`
  - `warning`: `text-amber-400`
  - `danger`: `text-red-400`

## File 2: `packages/ui/src/components/dashboard/kpi-grid.tsx`

'use client' component that fetches data and renders 6 KpiCards.

This component receives pre-fetched data as props (data fetching happens in the page/hook layer):

```tsx
import type { StatusResponse, BudgetResponse } from '@gilbertus/api-client';
import { FileText, Calendar, Users, Target, DollarSign, AlertTriangle } from 'lucide-react';
import { KpiCard } from './kpi-card';

interface KpiGridProps {
  status?: StatusResponse;        // from useStatus()
  commitmentsCount?: number;      // from useCommitmentsCount().data?.commitments.length
  budget?: BudgetResponse;        // from useBudget()
  isLoading?: boolean;
}
```

Cards to render (in order):
1. **Dokumenty** — `status.db.documents`, FileText icon, color='default'
2. **Eventy** — `status.db.events`, Calendar icon, color='default'
3. **Encje** — `status.db.entities`, Users icon, color='default'
4. **Otwarte zobowiązania** — `commitmentsCount`, Target icon, color: >10 ? 'warning' : 'default'
5. **Koszty dziś** — `$${budget.daily_total_usd.toFixed(2)}`, DollarSign icon, color based on budget status
6. **Aktywne alerty** — `status.db.alerts ?? 0`, AlertTriangle icon, color: >0 ? 'danger' : 'success'

Grid layout: `grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-6 gap-4`
When isLoading, render 6 KpiCard with isLoading=true.

For budget color: check if any budget has status='exceeded' → 'danger', 'warning' → 'warning', else 'success'.

tasks.title: Morning Brief component
tasks.description:
Build the morning brief widget that displays the daily brief as rendered Markdown.

## File: `packages/ui/src/components/dashboard/morning-brief.tsx`

'use client' component.

```tsx
import type { MorningBriefResponse } from '@gilbertus/api-client';

interface MorningBriefProps {
  data?: MorningBriefResponse;
  isLoading?: boolean;
  error?: Error | null;
  onRefresh?: () => void;          // triggers force-refresh
  isCollapsed?: boolean;
  onToggleCollapse?: () => void;
}
```

Structure:
- **Header bar:** Title 'Poranny Brief' + date badge (data.date formatted) + Refresh button (RefreshCw icon from lucide-react)
  - Refresh button: `onClick={onRefresh}`, add spinning animation while isLoading
  - Collapse toggle: ChevronDown/ChevronUp icon
- **Content (collapsible):**
  - Reuse `MarkdownRenderer` from `@gilbertus/ui` (already built in P1 at `packages/ui/src/components/chat/markdown-renderer.tsx`)
  - Import: `import { MarkdownRenderer } from '../chat/markdown-renderer';`
  - Pass `data.text` as content to MarkdownRenderer
- **Meta footer:** Small text showing events_count, entities_count, open_loops_count from data
  - Format: 'X wydarzeń · Y encji · Z otwartych wątków'
- **Loading state:** 4 skeleton lines (div with animate-pulse, varying widths: w-full, w-3/4, w-5/6, w-1/2)
- **Error state:** Red border card with error message and retry button
- **Empty state:** When data.text is null — show 'Brief nie został jeszcze wygenerowany' with Clock icon

Styling:
- Container: `rounded-lg bg-[var(--surface)] border border-[var(--border)]`
- Header: `flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-[var(--border)]`
- Content: `p-4` with max-height and overflow-y-auto for very long briefs
- Collapse animation: use CSS transition on max-height or conditional rendering
- Status badge colors: 'generated' → green dot, 'cached' → gray dot, 'error' → red dot

The MarkdownRenderer is already available from Part 1 — import it directly from the chat components. Do NOT create a new markdown renderer.

tasks.title: Alerts Feed + Alert Item components
tasks.description:
Build the alerts feed widget and individual alert item component.

## File 1: `packages/ui/src/components/dashboard/alert-item.tsx`

'use client' component for a single alert.

```tsx
import type { AlertItem as AlertItemType } from '@gilbertus/api-client';

interface AlertItemProps {
  alert: AlertItemType;
  onDismiss?: (alertId: number) => void;
}
```

Layout:
- Left: severity indicator dot (inline circle)
  - 'high': `bg-red-500`
  - 'medium': `bg-amber-500`
  - 'low': `bg-blue-500`
- Center:
  - Title: `text-sm font-medium text-[var(--text)]` — single line, truncate
  - Description: `text-xs text-[var(--text-secondary)]` — max 2 lines, line-clamp-2
  - Alert type badge: small pill with alert_type text
- Right:
  - Timestamp: relative format (e.g., '2h temu', 'wczoraj') — use simple relative time function (write inline, do NOT add a library)
  - Dismiss button: X icon, appears on hover, calls onDismiss(alert.alert_id)
- Hover: `hover:bg-[var(--surface-hover)]` transition

## File 2: `packages/ui/src/components/dashboard/alerts-feed.tsx`

'use client' component for the alerts list.

```tsx
import type { AlertItem as AlertItemType } from '@gilbertus/api-client';

interface AlertsFeedProps {
  alerts?: AlertItemType[];
  dismissedIds?: number[];         // from dashboard store
  isLoading?: boolean;
  error?: Error | null;
  onDismiss?: (alertId: number) => void;
  isCollapsed?: boolean;
  onToggleCollapse?: () => void;
}
```

Structure:
- **Header:** 'Alerty' title + count badge (number of visible alerts, excluding dismissed)
  - Badge: `rounded-full bg-red-500/20 text-red-400 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs`
  - Collapse toggle icon
- **Content (collapsible):**
  - Filter out dismissedIds from alerts array before rendering
  - Render AlertItem for each visible alert
  - Max height with scroll: `max-h-96 overflow-y-auto`
- **Loading:** 3 SkeletonCard components stacked
- **Empty:** 'Brak aktywnych alertów' with CheckCircle icon (green), centered
- **Error:** Error message with retry action

Styling: Same card container pattern as MorningBrief — `rounded-lg bg-[var(--surface)] border border-[var(--border)]`

tasks.title: Activity Timeline + System Status + Quick Actions
tasks.description:
Build the remaining three dashboard widgets: activity timeline, system status, and quick actions.

## File 1: `packages/ui/src/components/dashboard/timeline-event.tsx`

'use client' component for a single timeline event.

```tsx
import type { TimelineEvent as TimelineEventType } from '@gilbertus/api-client';

interface TimelineEventProps {
  event: TimelineEventType;
}
```

Layout:
- Left: event_type icon (map event types to Lucide icons)
  - 'meeting' / 'spotkanie': Calendar
  - 'decision' / 'decyzja': Gavel (or CheckSquare)
  - 'task' / 'zadanie': ListTodo
  - 'email': Mail
  - 'communication' / 'komunikacja': MessageSquare
  - 'conflict' / 'konflikt': AlertTriangle
  - 'commitment' / 'zobowiązanie': Target
  - default: Clock
- Center:
  - Summary text: `text-sm text-[var(--text)]` — max 2 lines
  - Entities: rendered as small tags/pills — `rounded-full bg-[var(--accent)]/10 text-[var(--accent)] px-2 py-0.5 text-xs`
- Right: event_time formatted as date+time or relative
- Divider line between events (vertical timeline line or border-b)

## File 2: `packages/ui/src/components/dashboard/activity-timeline.tsx`

'use client' component.

```tsx
import type { TimelineEvent as TimelineEventType } from '@gilbertus/api-client';

interface ActivityTimelineProps {
  events?: TimelineEventType[];
  isLoading?: boolean;
  error?: Error | null;
  filter?: string | null;          // current event_type filter
  onFilterChange?: (filter: string | null) => void;
  isCollapsed?: boolean;
  onToggleCollapse?: () => void;
}
```

Structure:
- Header: 'Oś czasu' + filter dropdown (select element with event types: All, Meeting, Decision, Task, Email, Communication)
- Event list: `max-h-[500px] overflow-y-auto`, renders TimelineEvent for each
- Loading: 5 skeleton items
- Empty: 'Brak wydarzeń w wybranym okresie'
- Filter dropdown: `<select>` with `bg-[var(--surface)] border-[var(--border)] text-[var(--text)]` styling

## File 3: `packages/ui/src/components/dashboard/system-status.tsx`

'use client' component.

```tsx
import type { StatusResponse } from '@gilbertus/api-client';

interface SystemStatusProps {
  status?: StatusResponse;
  isLoading?: boolean;
  error?: Error | null;
}
```

Structure:
- Header: 'Status systemu'
- Services grid (3 items in a row):
  - For each service in status.services (postgres, qdrant, whisper):
    - Traffic light dot: status === 'ok' → green (`bg-emerald-500`), else → red (`bg-red-500`)
    - Service name (capitalize first letter)
    - If error, show error text in red below
- DB stats mini row (below services):
  - Show: chunks, entities, events counts as small labeled values
  - Format large numbers with `.toLocaleString('pl-PL')`
- Embeddings progress: show `done/total` with a mini progress bar
- Last backup: formatted timestamp
- Use Database, Server, HardDrive icons from lucide-react

## File 4: `packages/ui/src/components/dashboard/quick-actions.tsx`

'use client' component.

```tsx
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';

interface QuickActionsProps {
  className?: string;
}
```

4 action buttons in a 2x2 grid:
1. 'Nowy czat' — MessageSquare icon — navigates to /chat
2. 'Meeting Prep' — Calendar icon — navigates to /chat with auto-query 'meeting prep'
3. 'Scan Market' — TrendingUp icon — navigates to /chat with auto-query 'market intelligence scan'
4. 'Compliance' — Shield icon — navigates to /chat with auto-query 'compliance check'

For buttons 2-4: navigate to `/chat?action=meeting-prep` (or similar). The chat page can read this query param and auto-trigger the action. For MVP, just navigate to /chat — the auto-query integration can be added later.

Button styling: `flex flex-col items-center gap-2 p-4 rounded-lg bg-[var(--surface)] border border-[var(--border)] hover:bg-[var(--surface-hover)] hover:border-[var(--accent)] transition-all cursor-pointer`
Icon: 24x24, text-[var(--accent)]
Label: `text-sm text-[var(--text)]`
